title: epilobium ciliatum var. glandulosum
intro: Epilobium ciliatum var. glandulosum, commonly known as California willowherb or glandular willowherb, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the willowherb family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The medicinal properties of Epilobium ciliatum var. glandulosum have been found to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antimicrobial activities. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to support urinary and reproductive health.
